title: Persons to whom Part applies
doc_html:
§4696.  Persons to whom Part applies

The rights accorded the property owner under this Part shall be applicable in favor of any person to whom the property owner has granted a conventional mortgage or vendor's privilege and to the property owner's heirs and assigns.
